task.zh: 让小车先慢后快到达终点！拖动速度条控制小车的速度！
task.en: Make the car go slow then fast to reach the finish! Drag the speed slider!

hints.zh: 开始时把速度条放低一些
hints.en: Start with the speed slider low

hints.zh: 后半段要加速——把速度条往上拉
hints.en: Speed up in the second half — slide it up

hints.zh: 看看图表上你的曲线和目标曲线的差距
hints.en: Compare your curve with the target on the graph
